topic: Independent and dependent variables in linear equations
latex:
The cost of a gym membership is represented by the equation $c = 0.05v + 20$, where $c$ is the cost per month and $v$ is the number of visits per month.

Identify the independent and dependent variables.

The independent variable is \underline{\hspace{2cm}} and the dependent variable is \underline{\hspace{2cm}}.

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|}
\hline
number of visits per month & total monthly cost \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
answer_latex: The independent variable is number of visits per month and the dependent variable is total monthly cost.
